response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming for UNIX embedded systems, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking or security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all essential for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems including embedded-like environments (e.g., DLang, real-time systems)
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical education, showing initiative and communication skills
concerns: No C or embedded Linux kernel development experience as required
No exposure to LAN-switch security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal)
Japanese language proficiency is absent, despite being a mandatory requirement

key_factors.factor: Lack of Network Security Domain Experience
